notes.body: Congrats! It is great to see Estep & Co back to #1 on Incidence Sales - keep it up! Milkshakes, Drinks, & Fries for Everyone!
KY-2065 open tasks: L-Rev (6/08, 6/09, 6/10), VO-Rec BOSS Alpha Ohio Valley (6/08, 6/10), VO-Rec Performance Fdsvce (6/09). Close these to clear the alert.
New shop: 6/04 Lunch scored 100.0%. On shift: Bobby Cline, Jada Cox, DaKayla Dorsey, Lidy Henry, Nathan Roberts, Kasey Wilson. Store June avg 97.5%, YTD 84.1%.
